subject: Matt Bevin

|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuzDhpK7WzZ1P5yt3YWDzquw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191106_fr_s&n=1) Team — Yesterday, Kentucky's Republican Governor Matt Bevin lost his reelection campaign. Trump and Bevin have a lot in common, so much so that Trump even went to Kentucky to hold a rally for the Governor, saying this: [**_“If you win, they are going to make it like, ho hum. And if you lose, they are going to say Trump suffered the greatest defeat in the history of the world. You can't let that happen to me!”_ — Donald Trump**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuzDhpK7WzZ1P5yt3YWDzquw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191106_fr_s&n=2) And now that Bevin has lost, THIS is how the President and his team have chosen to spin the news: [](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuzDhpK7WzZ1P5yt3YWDzquw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191106_fr_s&n=3)**If this is how they talk about their friends, imagine how they talk about their enemies.** This statement is just another example of how Donald Trump and his cronies are so willing to throw folks under the bus for making the president “look bad." This is the kind of behavior that has got to stop coming from the head of the Republican Party and the Oval Office. [**With the 2019 election season behind us and the 2020 election season in full swing, we’re gearing up for a major push to reclaim our party and our country. Do you think you can show your support for our efforts by pitching in $20.20 or whatever you can today to help us unseat this egomaniac?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuzDhpK7WzZ1P5yt3YWDzquw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191106_fr_s&n=4) | | [DONATE ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuzDhpK7WzZ1P5yt3YWDzquw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191106_fr_s&n=5)

clean_body: | | | | Friend, Two weeks from today, Tom will be on the national stage talking about his plans for structural reform, impeachment, and climate justice. Despite Tom launching this campaign from outside the Washington establishment — and months after any other candidate — the grassroots strength of this team has kept him moving forward with incredible momentum. Recent polls prove that voters believe in Tom’s message, and now we’re focused on building up a network of grassroots donors to get him into the December debate. Donate $1 to Tom 2020 today, and help make sure he’s on the next debate stage: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | We wouldn’t be asking for contributions unless it was important — even $1 will mean so much to Tom’s progress towards this critical goal, and it shows the public, the other candidates, and the media that this team is strong. Let’s keep it going! Tom 2020 P.S. Before the DNC debate, Tom will have a televised CNN Town Hall on Sunday, November 10 at 7:00 p.m. Eastern Time/4:00 p.m. Pacific Time. Make sure to tune in! | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]() We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about this movement. subject: falling short

body:
| | | A quick update for you, team: With Congressman Joe Kennedy III in the race, we're facing TWO primary opponents. The funds we raise now will make a huge impact on our campaign come Primary Day. But if we fall short of these early goals, we could see ourselves falling short of victory. So I have to ask you: _**[will you pitch in $27 or more before midnight and help us reach this week's fundraising goal?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-110619_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: hear me out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I started this campaign to give a voice to the voiceless. -Migrant families. -Trans folks. -The homeless. -Children in foster care. -Indigenous communities. -The poor and working poor. -Victims of police violence. **[_But now, I might not get the chance to fight for them at the next debate. So I 'm humbly asking: Will you rush $5 before midnight so I can fund the critical ads I need to make sure my voice -- and theirs -- is heard on that stage? >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191106_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** Hear me out: Making the next debate is bigger than me. It's about making sure we are talking about the most vulnerable in our community. It's why I visited asylum seekers in Matamoros, MX and homeless encampments under the Vegas strip. It's why I wasn't afraid to say Atatiana Jefferson's name at the last debate. It's why I met with inmates to hear their views on criminal justice reform. **And it 's why I need your help, now more than ever, to make that debate stage. ** Will you help me by rushing $5 before midnight? _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc806/3eb3e2fc/562544a6/744d95ac/2239875634/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191106_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**

| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc806/3eb3e2fc/562544a6/744d9595/2239875634/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc806/3eb3e2fc/562544a6/744d9594/2239875634/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc806/3eb3e2fc/562544a6/744d9593/2239875634/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Bennet for America
subject: Michael gives a damn about your kid's future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| [Bennet for America Announces "Educators for Bennet" Endorsements, including Former DNC General Chair & LA Superintendent Roy Romer](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae6a/134673f2/a6c69be/6997c01f/3386837169/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
Bennet for America announced "Educators for Bennet," with endorsements from 75 educators from across the country, including former General Chair of the DNC, Colorado Governor, and Los Angeles Unified School District Superintendent Roy Romer.

This new group reflects Michael's years of leadership on education, including as the former Superintendent of Denver Public Schools, a district with 95,000 students and a $1 billion budget (that's three times larger than the budget of South Bend, Indiana).

[Michael is the only school superintendent to ever run for president. It's time we have someone in the White House who gives a damn about your kid's future.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae6a/134673f2/a6c69be/6997c01f/3386837169/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Will you join these educators from all around the country, and chip in to support Michael's campaign today? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae6a/134673f2/a6c69be/6997c01e/3386837169/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Under Bennet's leadership, the Denver Public Schools increased student learning, grew student enrollment, decreased dropout rates, and improved graduation rates and college enrollment.

As a member of the Senate committee that oversees education, Bennet was instrumental in the 2015 passage of the sweeping, bipartisan overhaul of No Child Left Behind.

[As Roy Romer said, "Michael has never lost the values that made him an extraordinary Superintendent: honesty, empathy, and a deep faith in the potential of every child in America."](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae6a/134673f2/a6c69be/6997c01f/3386837169/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Securing a brighter future for the next generation starts by understanding why our schools fail so many students.

There is no one better qualified to reimagine the current system and put children on a path to success.

[_Michael will be the education president America needs._](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae6a/134673f2/a6c69be/6997c01f/3386837169/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Do you want a president who actually gives a damn about your kid 's future? Team, it's time we make our schools engines of opportunity again. Chip in to support Michael's campaign today!**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae6a/134673f2/a6c69be/6997c01c/3386837169/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I want to tell you a story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
A thin young man -- really just a kid -- in a loose-fitting suit, with a backpack slung over his shoulder, looked at me and smiled. A minute later, he came over. "Are you Elizabeth Warren?" | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528e47/45c30650/107fbc6f4/66f5d002/47429941/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I want to tell you a story.

One night, in the middle of my 2012 Senate campaign, Bruce and I snuck out to the movies.

We were headed home from Boston at about eleven o'clock, standing on the subway platform with a few other late-night travelers, waiting for the train.

A thin young man -- really just a kid -- in a loose-fitting suit, with a backpack slung over his shoulder, looked at me and smiled. A minute later, he came over. _"Are you Elizabeth Warren?"_

He was from central Massachusetts, the first in his family to go to college. He was attending school in Boston and he loved it, but he said he worried about money all the time. He worked a full-time job during the school year and took two jobs during the summer to try to cover as much as he could.

As we waited for the train, we talked about student loans, declining government investment in universities, and rising tuition. Finally, he asked if he could take a picture. Bruce snapped the shot on the young man's phone. The young man smiled and started to walk away, then turned around.

"I give you money every month, and I'm taking on hours so I can give more."

**I felt as if he'd hit me with a spear right between the ribs.** This kid was working until nearly eleven o'clock on a Saturday night and he was sending me money? I smiled weakly. I said thanks, but maybe he should keep the money.

He looked back at me. "No, I'm part of this campaign. This is my fight, too."

And that really was the answer. It wasn't just my campaign. My name was on the ticket, but people weren't volunteering and donating just for me.

They were supporting something a lot bigger. When I said that we were better off if we invested in the future together, people already knew it was true -- and they lived it. They thought America could do better, and they wanted it every bit as much as I did. And they would do everything possible to try to make that better future a reality.

"This is my fight, too." It still gives me goosebumps.

Seven years later, and it's still the case. My name may be on a different ballot, but this campaign isn't about me.

It's about the single mother struggling to afford skyrocketing child care costs. It's about the first-generation college student setting aside their big dreams because of student loan debt. It's about the man on the T platform juggling multiple jobs to make ends meet. And it's about you.

I'm eternally grateful to everyone who fuels our grassroots campaign -- pouring their time, their money, and their passion into a cause that's bigger than all of us. We're still in this fight -- together.

If it makes sense for you right now, **[please click here to make a contribution to our grassroots movement.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528e47/45c30650/107fbc6f4/66f5d005/47429941/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDI3Rl9FR1JfQklPX0VfMjAxOTExMDZfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML27F_EGR_BIO_E_20191106_V1S1_P")** If it doesn't, I am still honored to have you on this team -- and I promise I will fight my heart out in the weeks and months to come.

Together, we will win in 2020, and bring big, structural change in 2021.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528e47/45c30650/107fbc6f4/66f5d005/47429941/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDI3Rl9FR1JfQklPX0VfMjAxOTExMDZfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML27F_EGR_BIO_E_20191106_V1S1_P")
---
| | | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528e47/45c30650/107fbc6f4/66f5d004/47429941/VEsC/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528e47/45c30650/107fbc6f4/66f5d007/47429941/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528e47/45c30650/107fbc6f4/66f5d006/47429941/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528e47/45c30650/107fbc6f4/66f5d009/47429941/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528e47/45c30650/107fbc6f4/66f5d008/47429941/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528e47/45c30650/107fbc6f4/66f5d00b/47429941/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: Booker HQ
subject: ...about the December debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey there, Jenna here. I wanted to send you a quick note about the December debate. I know we've already written to you about how Cory needs 200,000 individual donors to qualify for that debate. That's not all. **He also needs to hit 4% in four separate polls to secure his spot on the stage -- and we 're not quite there yet.** Now, you may be asking yourself, why hasn't Cory been polling higher? Well, you, _my dad,_ and everyone else I've talked to in the last three days, have been thinking the same thing. Here are a few reasons:
1. Cory didn't enter this race with broad name recognition like Joe Biden or Bernie Sanders.
2. This is the most crowded primary our party has ever seen.
3. And truthfully, our team didn't spend years building out his fundraising list. We had to build some things for scratch when this campaign got started.

**Here 's one thing we know for sure: the more people hear from Cory, the more they like him. [Right now, we're asking everyone to chip in so we can launch ads in the early states and make sure Cory's on the December debate stage.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191106_BHQ_20191106-fr-BHQ-polling-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Cory's favorability numbers are high -- _some of the highest in this race!_ \-- and we know that he's being actively considered by many voters and caucus-goers. In fact, in many polls, he's being considered by more voters than the top two or three candidates. These ads make a real difference and reach large numbers of voters, many of whom haven't been introduced to Cory yet. **[These ads aren't cheap though. Are you able to send in a few dollars now to help us out?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191106_BHQ_20191106-fr-BHQ-polling-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** All of us here at HQ are so thankful to have supporters like you. Jenna Jenna Lowenstein
Deputy Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191106_BHQ_20191106-fr-BHQ-polling-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0aa1/5fca0d19/7674fe83/291c1345/2419279598/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0aa1/5fca0d19/7674fe83/291c1344/2419279598/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0aa1/5fca0d19/7674fe83/291c1343/2419279598/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0aa1/5fca0d19/7674fe83/291c1342/2419279598/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0aa1/5fca0d19/7674fe83/291c1341/2419279598/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0aa1/5fca0d19/7674fe83/291c1345/2419279598/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

We can get on the debate stage if we have the resources to reach voters in critical early primary states. Will you pitch in so we can qualify for the final debate of 2019?

name: TomSteyer.com
subject: Add your name to pledge to be a voter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Blue won big in Virginia last night, friend! Virginians from across the Commonwealth raised their voices in this historic election — because of those voters, Virginia has a Democratic legislature and a Democratic governor for the first time in a generation. That means true progress is ahead. TeamTom knocked on more than 2,500 doors and was part of the effort to flip Virginia blue. Some of the races were close, with differences of just hundreds of votes. This is what grassroots organizing looks like. [_**Let’s keep this blue wave going through 2020 — will you pledge to be a voter today?**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU-2FfKmG9720-2FxBePhrLXyH4t11p63491d2yGwE7S-2F3zsToy3s4VrpNe27NF7gOZ2PuZwTK8JrgzHKmTHHX3HV0e14G6id15Ga4GThKpWOvs-2FQzAvFALz84H2F663var6ycaFVciqzKBdbfytozzpVIMq5gP5sRTWLFMm-2F-2BchEVbddkxGqzMKULCyKCtQDRI9q8-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFfP36TR6SGWFt8vjPIdaxCusUpqC2rG2YKpXsQtwyyduRtvls-2FSaly8y7syN5bNsbFvAlxxIw5klB3GkuTsgM-2F-2BgCKZaZ-2FVmkKVaK7Uc2zzDvJv8UNw6cggKKXTjL4YEmprMicndmsJgRfJdnpWlhtfDqZwdjzWB6cXBZvpL3V-2FR5a6CRaw-2B74iVspd0xj-2BwqsOih6Ya9zjR2k9-2BSLvIrhcUi-2BVHEZoeKX7eRvx2cVT2aQ6HcAyfGm-2BKkT63-2FCW11T87VvHLCFiDdMcVMToqO3R9xGlGIXMy89E6HDsyeHz2GRjDBs2-2BMQ9VhJ70Uka8Igs9gKjCdDiJzpjMPT6PIbk4TVckCfLYkraxx3RCNODzw-3D-3D) Democracy means more than voting once every four years. It’s making sure to vote in your state and local elections so we can elect Democratic leaders at every level. Tom signed the Run for Something Down-Ballot Pledge back in August, which means he’s fully committed to supporting races across the country, investing in infrastructure, and elevating progressive leaders that reflect the fabric of America — especially young people, women, and people of color. clean_body: | | | | Blue won big in Virginia last night, friend! Virginians from across the Commonwealth raised their voices in this historic election — because of those voters, Virginia has a Democratic legislature and a Democratic governor for the first time in a generation. That means true progress is ahead. TeamTom knocked on more than 2,500 doors and was part of the effort to flip Virginia blue. Some of the races were close, with differences of just hundreds of votes. This is what grassroots organizing looks like. Democracy means more than voting once every four years. It’s making sure to vote in your state and local elections so we can elect Democratic leaders at every level. Tom signed the Run for Something Down-Ballot Pledge back in August, which means he’s fully committed to supporting races across the country, investing in infrastructure, and elevating progressive leaders that reflect the fabric of America — especially young people, women, and people of color. name: Steve Chabot
subject: Camp David
body:
A Watergate Connection? No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Camp David](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-j/)
This past weekend I was humbled to be a guest at Camp David. Steeped in mystery, this decades old presidential retreat has an amazing history. In this week's blog, I write about how a place known as Shangri-La became Camp David, and you won't want to miss what I found written in a book in my cabin! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Is Hillary Going to Run Again?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-d/)
Hillary is still out there claiming she won the presidential election, and now she's making noises that she might run again in 2020. Besides Hillary, there are also rumors of several other candidates that still might jump into the Democrat's primary pool - Michelle Obama, Oprah? In this week's blog, I let you know what I think of Hillary's and other potential candidate's chances of jumping in. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [When You're The Front-Runner, You're the Target](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-u/)
About two months ago I made a prediction that Elizabeth Warren was the person most likely to be the Democratic nominee for president. Was my prediction correct? This week I discuss why criticisms of Warren's radical policies and ultra-leftist thinking are evidence that this prediction may very well be true. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A Reason to Celebrate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-n/)
I recently spoke to a gathering of pro-life constituents on our shared commitment to protect innocent unborn lives. Calling it a "Thanksgiving Vigil," we were gathered to reflect and celebrate advancement in our pro-life mission. In this week's blog, I discuss the reason why we were celebrating and how this news is another accomplishment in our battle to protect those who are the most vulnerable. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddugdk-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Joe Sestak
subject: #uniteforvets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
**Other than during the Civil War, it's hard to imagine a time when our nation has been less unified.**
But one thing that always binds us together is the abiding respect we all share for our veterans. In a time of such division, why don’t we actually do at least what the “Veterans Day Moment of Silence Act of 2016” ([link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11623555/118563251/-291706709?emci=1ca60de1-5c01-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&overview=closed%C2%A0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDVmZTQwNS02ZDAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9ZuzX93jt8Ey8qQ8BfzHegQo7z-2eqyTFvERzmx-EU=)) said we would: observe **two minutes of unified silence throughout our beautiful land at the same time every Veterans Day (which this year falls on Monday, November 11th).**
This law **calls for the President to issue a Proclamation each year calling on all of America to observe this moment of silence starting at 2:11 pm Eastern Time.** If you agree, please **post your support on Twitter and Facebook** to urge the President to **honor our vets with the hashtag #uniteforvets**.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11623556/118563252/1327831542?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDVmZTQwNS02ZDAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9ZuzX93jt8Ey8qQ8BfzHegQo7z-2eqyTFvERzmx-EU=&emci=1ca60de1-5c01-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=6d5fe405-6d01-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
_Joe visits with an incarcerated veteran at Graterford State Correctional Institution on Veterans Day, 2015_
As I typically do, I will be visiting with incarcerated veterans this Veterans Day at Graterford/Phoenix prison in my native Pennsylvania.
You can **read about my policy plans for veterans** issues [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11623557/118563253/-1403930100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDVmZTQwNS02ZDAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9ZuzX93jt8Ey8qQ8BfzHegQo7z-2eqyTFvERzmx-EU=&emci=1ca60de1-5c01-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=6d5fe405-6d01-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798).
Warmest regards, Joe

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President.
Joe Sestak for President
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

name: Chris Finello
subject: Rep. Fitzpatrick doesn’t want us to know the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
Peter,

Last week, Congress held a vote to set rules for the impeachment inquiry and the procedures for upcoming public hearings \-- it was an important step toward helping Congress uncover the truth.

My opponent Brian Fitzpatrick, however, voted to shield Trump from accountability. His constituents, not GOP leaders, should have guided his vote, but since he hasn’t held a public town hall in over two years, it makes sense that he doesn’t know what his constituents want.

We can absolutely beat Fitzpatrick and turn PA-01 blue \-- it’s one of just two seats that Hillary Clinton won in 2016 that STILL has a GOP representative up for re-election. And both Gov. Tom Wolf and Sen. Bob Casey won this district in 2018. We’re running a powerful grassroots campaign, and you know I won’t ever stand on the sidelines while Pennsylvania families struggle to make ends meet like my opponent does.

But right now, we’re pretty far behind on our November goal, and with Thanksgiving coming up in just a couple weeks, we’ve got to get ahead now because the holiday week will be hard on our fundraising. That’s why I’m writing to you now.

If we’re going to win this race, I need your help right now.

We HAVE to raise $1,258 before tomorrow at midnight if we’re going to get back on track to hit our November goal. Please give $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can to help us close the gap at the link below.

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finelloforcongress**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11625317/118580978/2063951955?refcode=CFN20191107a&refcode2=5wEY87cB2jYNBrRWHz3r&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTc1Yjk1ZC03MTAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D1VWpJGkC1yNGuKAMYTaw_z_R75nEBZSuEMgoxICV5M=)

Thanks so much,
Chris

clean_body: Peter, Last week, Congress held a vote to set rules for the impeachment inquiry and the procedures for upcoming public hearings \-- it was an important step toward helping Congress uncover the truth. My opponent Brian Fitzpatrick, however, voted to shield Trump from accountability. His constituents, not GOP leaders, should have guided his vote, but since he hasn’t held a public town hall in over two years, it makes sense that he doesn’t know what his constituents want. We can absolutely beat Fitzpatrick and turn PA-01 blue \-- it’s one of just two seats that Hillary Clinton won in 2016 that STILL has a GOP representative up for re-election. And both Gov. Tom Wolf and Sen. Bob Casey won this district in 2018. We’re running a powerful grassroots campaign, and you know I won’t ever stand on the sidelines while Pennsylvania families struggle to make ends meet like my opponent does. But right now, we’re pretty far behind on our November goal, and with Thanksgiving coming up in just a couple weeks, we’ve got to get ahead now because the holiday week will be hard on our fundraising. That’s why I’m writing to you now. If we’re going to win this race, I need your help right now. We HAVE to raise $1,258 before tomorrow at midnight if we’re going to get back on track to hit our November goal. Please give $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can to help us close the gap at the link below. = Thanks so much, Chris | Paid for by Finello for Congress | ---|---|--- Finello for Congress P.O. Our country is facing a moral crossroads and an immigration crisis ravaging our southern border, all perpetuated by Democrats' socialist agenda and fixation on flipping the Senate by defeating my dear friend, Martha McSally.

Martha has never backed down from a fight and despite Democrats already spending and raising tens of millions attacking her, she remains unwavering. **Martha spent over two decades in the military and has defined her career through three important words: service before self.**

name: Brandon Fricke
subject: Democrats to blame for wildfires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fricke for Congress
body:
This isn't the first time President Trump has called Democrats out for failing to keep Californians safe from wildfires. | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53403610:sCgTWjvNN:m:1:2185358397:2F7DCF2341819C8077EA5E2EB5424859:r)
---
Friend,

You'd think our elected officials would have their constituents' safety as their top priority ... not the case for California Democrats like Gavin Newsom and **Congressman Ted Lieu.**

As California -- including my 33rd District -- suffered devastating wildfires once again this year, President Trump called out California Democrats for continuing to fail to do their job to prevent wildfires.

_What did Ted Lieu do?_ He went straight to Twitter to try and point the finger of blame back at the President rather than addressing his own failed leadership

This does not come as a surprise. After all, Ted Lieu mistakenly thinks his job, the sole reason why he was elected, is to attack the President at every opportunity.

**Ted Lieu and other California Democrats have prioritized their radical leftist agenda over the safety of our state's citizens. It's time to hold them accountable.**

Radical leftist Congressman **Ted Lieu** is one of the failed Democrats who passed laws destroying our state when he was in the State Legislature, and now he's in Congress leading the charge to take down our President.

[**I'm running for Congress to defeat Ted Lieu, restore representative leadership to California, and make wildfire prevention an actual priority. Will you help me take down this failed Democrat by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or more today?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53403610:sCgTWjvNN:m:1:2185358397:2F7DCF2341819C8077EA5E2EB5424859:r)

[ **Defeat CA Dems
DONATE TODAY ››**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53403610:sCgTWjvNN:m:1:2185358397:2F7DCF2341819C8077EA5E2EB5424859:r)
This isn't the first time President Trump has called Democrats out for failing to keep Californians safe from wildfires. In fact, he said this a year ago...

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53403610:sCgTWjvNN:m:1:2185358397:2F7DCF2341819C8077EA5E2EB5424859:r)

Yet, Democrats continue to ignore this while homes and lives are lost to devastating, preventable wildfires year after year.

**Failed politicians like Gavin Newsom and Ted Lieu are to blame, and I need your help to hold them accountable.**

[**It's time to kick Ted Lieu out of Congress -- California deserves better than his constant neglect. Will you join my campaign today with a donation of $10, $25, $50 or even more today?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53403610:sCgTWjvNN:m:1:2185358397:2F7DCF2341819C8077EA5E2EB5424859:r)

[ **Defeat CA Dems
DONATE TODAY ››**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53403610:sCgTWjvNN:m:1:2185358397:2F7DCF2341819C8077EA5E2EB5424859:r)

Thank you,

Brandon Fricke
Candidate for Congress
CA-33

body:
Do you think Republicans are doing enough to expand the party's base? | **URGENT SURVEY:**
_[Do you believe that a woman of color can be a conservative Republican without being "Brain-washed?"](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53403690:WUah7jvNZ:m:1:2105898951:4E3075D089574B90D5AAD69FCF00725D:r)_
**SUMMARY:** I've been smeared and slurred by liberals who proclaim their open-mindedness, tolerance, and desire for diversity. They say I must be brain-washed to be a _conservative_.

I need to hear from you because I think liberals are the ones who are brain-washed. Help me fight the liberal smears and set the record straight. [RESPOND ->](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53403690:WUah7jvNZ:m:1:2105898951:4E3075D089574B90D5AAD69FCF00725D:r)

I'm reaching out to you today because **you've been identified as one of the most highly informed, active Republicans in the country** , and I want to get your input on how you think Republicans can win back the house next year.

Currently, there are seven times as many female Democrats serving in the U.S. House than there are Republicans. I believe our party has a reputation that can only be addressed by nominating more women to serve in office - but I want to know what you think.

[Would you spare less than one minute to answer a few questions for me today? Click this unique link to begin your digital survey](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53403690:WUah7jvNZ:m:1:2105898951:4E3075D089574B90D5AAD69FCF00725D:r) 🔗

**DID YOU KNOW** that in our country's 243-year history 12,343 American's have served as members of Congress? And if you're like me, you might be thinking, "I wonder how many women that number includes?"

Well, you're in luck, I've got the answer for you: only 365 women have served in Congress, either as a U.S. Representative or U.S. Senator.

Lewis. C.S. Lewis, best known as the author of the _Chronicles of Narnia_ , also authored works on apologetics and philosophy, including _The Abolition of Man_ and _Mere Christianity_. [This free online course](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KzSmlZam6RkO6j1uqlHLUqPKCDEJPbsfqIOCctgdxPRg1L2Lk2pqp5e3-G6z2B8eZIE3J7lhQQhfYoRw_OjZLm05BlNknbuuR1ZCT4YYRmcRZYUDwBT4SQBTIQEbuvIKdEd-QVVTH4S-qNkdaq_1IVtIAj81err11aOF3fW2syIS61qxqSZUAcmRtdDGrrIawFZ_n95lMG4b9nE1Arndp7dntPnHT2ybbIQaU5nbQUfWIMyYZiKzY4_2RQ91X10B_9kQFvo26eq9dIMwQh_76O1wo_kPS2B7edNVCJaWgD_BZo5tW9SUtXQH_CNezcrLLWb__TPyZ82WHzK27TOA3tPPYY3c_acD&c=GckkGSq1j5gOPYb1OjHOzjKztH0imLBXcLqVDuXvbKYXAN877A0MrQ==&ch=BO0mmDfwE5PB3I3GJw2nxWaHyVyL3capxj00Lts2cYHvkjwlgi0NsQ==) will study both Lewis's apologetics and his fiction, as well as his philosophical and literary writings, and their continuing significance today. I have the privilege of delivering three of the nine lectures, and I will be joined by Michael Ward, a leading expert on the works of C.S. Lewis, and Hillsdale professor of English and Provost, David Whalen. I hope you enjoy the course. **[Activate your course today, for free.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KzSmlZam6RkO6j1uqlHLUqPKCDEJPbsfqIOCctgdxPRg1L2Lk2pqp5e3-G6z2B8eZIE3J7lhQQhfYoRw_OjZLm05BlNknbuuR1ZCT4YYRmcRZYUDwBT4SQBTIQEbuvIKdEd-QVVTH4S-qNkdaq_1IVtIAj81err11aOF3fW2syIS61qxqSZUAcmRtdDGrrIawFZ_n95lMG4b9nE1Arndp7dntPnHT2ybbIQaU5nbQUfWIMyYZiKzY4_2RQ91X10B_9kQFvo26eq9dIMwQh_76O1wo_kPS2B7edNVCJaWgD_BZo5tW9SUtXQH_CNezcrLLWb__TPyZ82WHzK27TOA3tPPYY3c_acD&c=GckkGSq1j5gOPYb1OjHOzjKztH0imLBXcLqVDuXvbKYXAN877A0MrQ==&ch=BO0mmDfwE5PB3I3GJw2nxWaHyVyL3capxj00Lts2cYHvkjwlgi0NsQ==)** |

name: Jason Lewis
subject: Clueless MN socialists!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
Minnesota’s extreme-left rallied at the University of Minnesota on Sunday night... and Bernie and Ilhan Omar were about as predictable as could be.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/a3577669808dd516/04ebc73d72dcaae9c3d6b838967d376c/33183) Fellow Conservative, Minnesota’s extreme-left rallied at the University of Minnesota on Sunday night... and Bernie and Ilhan Omar were about as predictable as could be. From **calls for job-killing tax hikes and AOC’s Green New Deal** to **defending Omar’s disgraceful Armenian genocide “present” vote** to **chants of “lock him up” directed at President Trump** , Sunday night was a big coming out party for Minnesota’s socialist MOB. It's the same rabid and clueless mob we saw protesting – and assaulting people and our police – outside of President Trump’s Target Center rally just weeks ago! Get to know them. name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: One year out...
body:
Peter,
Set the countdown clock. This week marks one year out from the 2020 November elections.
Stop for a moment and imagine what will happen to the sanctity of life, the Supreme Court, religious freedom, gender, and family, if Christians _don’t_ vote _._
**We already know from trends in previous elections an estimated 25 MILLION _registered Christians_ won’t vote and will keep their voices silent. But your partnership with us will change this frightening statistic. **
More than 100,000 elections will take place across the nation this upcoming year from the federal to the local level.
Voters who turn out to the polls will determine if President Trump stays to serve another term or if a new president is elected. The future of the U.S. Congress will be set for another two years, with all 435 seats in the House up for grabs and 33 Senate Seats at stake.
Crunch time is here - campaigns are in full swing - and My Faith Votes has major deadlines to hit every month to achieve our goals for November 3, 2020 by influencing every election with biblical values.
I’ll get right to the point — leading up to November 2020, TV and radio PSAs will be running around the country reaching millions; millennials and Generation Z will be reached on Christian campuses; hundreds of thousands of Christians will be mobilized using peer-to-peer texting and door-to-door outreach, all in an effort to motivate and equip Christians with everything they need to take action.
Thousands of Christians who did not vote in 2016 have been specifically identified, and My Faith Votes is reaching out directly to help equip them with voter guides and get them to the polls. [Your donation of any amount will impact Christians](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p191107apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191107apl01nd&n=1). Every vote matters to protect the most fundamental principles that founded our nation and are rooted in our faith.
It’s never been more crucial for us to elect a president and a congress who defend our beliefs and ensure faith is protected in our laws and by the Supreme Court for decades to come.
Thank you for your help today. I wouldn’t be asking if I didn’t honestly believe it would make a real difference in 2020 and for the future of our country.
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p191107apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191107apl01nd&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191107apl01nd&n=3)
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191107apl01nd&n=4).

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Thanking Roger Stone
body:
Over the weekend, I attended an event for Roger Stone, a friend placed in a horrible situation due to the Democrats continued Witch Hunt against President Trump.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352748-821209-4708705-1be9b0198e-cd796edb1c)
Patriot,

Over the weekend, I spoke at an event for Roger Stone, a friend placed in a horrible unjust situation due to the Democrat's continued Witch Hunt against President Trump.

I was truly honored when he unexpectedly gave me a shout out during his speech to endorse my run for Congress in FL CD 21 where President and Mrs. Trump will be voting in 2020.

[**Watch the video here:**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352748-821209-4708704-ff3bfcb81c-cd796edb1c)

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352748-821209-4708704-ff3bfcb81c-cd796edb1c)
What Roger Stone and our president have gone through at the hands of radical Democrats is yet another reason why I’m running for Congress.

When I earn the privilege to serve, you know me, and you know that I will not quietly sit by while Democrats attempt to disrupt President Trump’s second term in office.

He needs VOCAL defenders who aren’t afraid to stand up to leftist Democrats – and I’m up to the task.

[**Please watch the video and support my campaign today.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352748-821209-4708704-ff3bfcb81c-cd796edb1c)

Thank you again for all that you do, and thank you to Roger Stone for his continued support. Please say a prayer during Roger's unjust trial that's going on now in Washigton, D.C.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. I have another essential endorsement that I'll be releasing soon. They will be joining Rep. Paul Gosar, Michelle Malkin, Juanita Broaddrick, Chuck Woolery, and Wayne Allyn Root in support of my race against Lois Frankel. [**Watch Roger’s endorsement here.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352748-821209-4708704-ff3bfcb81c-cd796edb1c)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-352748-821209-84585d41bbe610b-cd796edb1c)

name: Cory Booker
subject: Can you believe we've done four of these already?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, In less than two weeks, I'll be on the November debate stage with Andrew Yang, Amy Klobuchar, Tom Steyer, Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, Elizabeth Warren, Joe Biden, Tulsi Gabbard, and Bernie Sanders. **I want your input on which issues you want to hear about before I take the stage.[Can you take two minutes to fill out the official Cory 2020 November Debate Prep Survey? This is the most effective way to share your thoughts with me.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-debate-survey?source=em_su_20191107_CB_20191107-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** During the last debate, there wasn't a single question about the existential threat of climate change. No candidate was asked about college affordability, the humanitarian crisis at our border, or how we'll reform our disastrously broken criminal justice system. And far too little time was spent discussing issues like women's reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ equality. **[That's why I'm asking you -- which issues do you most want to hear about in the next debate? Take the survey and let me know >>](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-debate-survey?source=em_su_20191107_CB_20191107-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** When I step onto that stage in a few weeks, I want to be ready -- and with your help, I will be. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-debate-survey?source=em_su_20191107_CB_20191107-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0aa3/5fca0d19/767f1235/291c138e/768537667/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0aa3/5fca0d19/767f1235/291c138d/768537667/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0aa3/5fca0d19/767f1235/291c138c/768537667/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0aa3/5fca0d19/767f1235/291c138b/768537667/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Yang2020.com
subject: We’re in this to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Keep our ads running and ensure as many Americans as possible know what this campaign is all about.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2785%2E377263%2E6Zcdpb)
We are launching our first TV ad, Yang Gang!

We know when voters see this ad, they’ll learn what sets Andrew apart from the rest of the field. He’s the only candidate tackling the biggest problems of our time -- automation, our changing economy, too many Americans being left behind -- and proposing a new way forward.

The most important thing that we can do to raise Andrew’s poll numbers and get him into the December debate is to keep this ad on the air. That’s where you come in.

**[Thanks to your help we just placed our first ad buy, but to keep this on air we need to raise an additional $1 million in the next week. Please watch our new ad here, then pitch in $5 now. Every dollar you give ensures another voter hears Andrew’s message.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16251?t=5&akid=2785%2E377263%2E6Zcdpb)** | [Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16251?t=8&akid=2785%2E377263%2E6Zcdpb)
---
**The Iowa caucuses are less than 90 days away. And our ads are one of the most efficient and effective ways to get Andrew in front of critical early state voters.**

With so many people undecided, this is the time to make our move and show them what we’re fighting for.

**[Pitch in $5 now to keep our ads running and ensure as many Americans as possible get a chance to feel a renewed hope for the future and get behind Andrew’s new way forward.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16251?t=7&akid=2785%2E377263%2E6Zcdpb)**

Thank you for powering this movement,

Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16251?t=6&akid=2785%2E377263%2E6Zcdpb)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! Friend,

We just wanted to take a brief minute to explain why your support matters so much.

Over the past few months, Democrats have made their vision for our country clear - and it’s _frightening_ :
* Open borders, sanctuary cities, and decriminalizing illegal border crossings
* Seizing our guns
* Complete government takeover of our health care system
* Impeaching and removing President Trump from office

**The Radical Left stands AGAINST everything we stand for.**

When grassroots supporters, like yourself, chip in a few dollars at uncertain times like these, it fuels our fight and reminds us how important it is we continue to stand up to the Radical Left.

clean_body: Don't want to receive our emails? | Friend, We just wanted to take a brief minute to explain why your support matters so much. Over the past few months, Democrats have made their vision for our country clear - and it’s frightening : Open borders, sanctuary cities, and decriminalizing illegal border crossings Seizing our guns Complete government takeover of our health care system Impeaching and removing President Trump from office The Radical Left stands AGAINST everything we stand for. When grassroots supporters, like yourself, chip in a few dollars at uncertain times like these, it fuels our fight and reminds us how important it is we continue to stand up to the Radical Left. | What we accomplish this month will give us the momentum we need to finish the year strong! Thanks, Senator Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump is destroying the environment, and no one is watching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, American media and talking points have been so consumed by impeachment and Trump's bombastic defense of himself that we are ignoring all the other sinister things he's been doing as president. Trump announced that he was undoing a nearly two decades-long regulation that limits logging in the Tongass National Forest in Alaska \-- one of the most pristine regions of untouched nature in America, filled with salmon creeks, fjords, and glaciers stretching from mountaintops down to the icy waters surrounding Juneau. This is just the latest in a string of environmental regulations unravelled and shredded by Trump and his pro-massive corporation, anti-science, climate change-denying EPA. We need to hear what engaged voters think about this issue: **Are you worried about the environment with Trump in office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc4b/6e9863e8/1637d6dc/1db09c9b/3472622094/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/O-uWesOh") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc4b/6e9863e8/1637d6dc/1db09c9b/3472622094/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/O-uWesOh") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc4b/6e9863e8/1637d6dc/1db09c99/3472622094/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191107a.ND-b&refcode2=sJB0MI3CLANKzTSiplaQ")

body:
#
_Peter, we 're counting on supporters like you to share important news about Joe Biden's candidacy. Check out the links below and spread the word, and keep an eye out for more emails like this one! _
* * *

**One primary poll:**

Joe Biden has a 10 point lead over Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders in Nevada.
_(Source:[The Nevada Independent](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df769d/287b9173/2b05dd7d/7e7664ed/2048460328/VEsH/?g= "https://thenevadaindependent.com/article/poll-biden-holds-significant-lead-over-warren-sanders-in-nevada-top-issue-is-electing-someone-who-can-beat-trump"))_

**One general election poll:**

name: Nikki Foster
subject: Mitch McConnell, there's a storm coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
---
| | Despite a last minute visit from Trump to shore up support for the Republican incumbent, Kentuckians just elected a Democratic governor -- sending a strong and loud message to Mitch McConnell: there's a storm coming. Amy McGrath, a veteran fighter pilot, is boldly taking on McConnell in 2020, and these election results show that Kentucky is ready for a change. On McConnell's watch, he's left countless crucial bills to wither and die -- bills to secure our elections, to protect the LBGTQ community, and to address the climate crisis, to name a few. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Despite a last minute visit from Trump to shore up support for the Republican incumbent, Kentuckians just elected a Democratic governor -- sending a strong and loud message to Mitch McConnell: **there 's a storm coming.** Amy McGrath, a veteran fighter pilot, is boldly taking on McConnell in 2020, and these election results show that Kentucky is ready for a change. **On McConnell 's watch, he's left countless crucial bills to wither and die** \-- bills to secure our elections, to protect the LBGTQ community, and to address the climate crisis, to name a few. This is going to be a tough fight for Amy, but as a fighter pilot myself, I know we never back down from a challenge. That's why I'm positive Amy is the right person for the job. [**And that 's why I'm asking you to split a donation between mine and Amy's campaigns -- can we count on you to join the fight?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_split_mcgrath?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191107_McGrath_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+And+thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+asking+you+to&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191107_McGrath_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191107_McGrath_U1_X1") [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_split_mcgrath?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191107_McGrath_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191107_McGrath_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191107_McGrath_U1_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_split_mcgrath?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191107_McGrath_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191107_McGrath_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191107_McGrath_U1_X1")

Amy made history by being the first woman Marine to fly an F/A-18 on a combat mission -- **meanwhile, Mitch is making history by being the Senator with the LOWEST approval rating.**
The fact is, Amy and I are both going to have a really tough road on our way to Washington. Both of our opponents take millions in corporate PAC money to finance their reelection bids.
But having fought our whole military careers, **we 're up for the challenge.**
We hope you are too. [**Will you split a donation between our campaigns today so we can take on McConnell and Chabot 's dark money and win?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_split_mcgrath?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191107_McGrath_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+Will+you+split+a+donation+between+our+ca&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191107_McGrath_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191107_McGrath_U1_X1")

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Absolute Anarchy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
This weekend we saw a disgusting display of anarchy take to the streets of Brooklyn. Over 1,000 anti-police anarchists caused chaos, jumping turnstiles, defacing MTA buses and NYPD vehicles and displaying messages of hate and violence against our men and women in blue.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=12A15A1A246)
---
| | |
---
| | **Friends-

** This past weekend we saw a disgusting display of anarchy take to the streets of Brooklyn.

Over 1,000 anti-police anarchists caused chaos, jumping turnstiles, defacing MTA buses and NYPD vehicles and displaying messages of hate and violence against our men and women in blue.

“F—k the police,” “Don’t let these pigs touch us” and “Punch That Cop” were just a few of the disgusting signs spotted.

[Friends, as I highlighted in today’s Staten Island Advance, our city is spiraling out of control.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=12A15A1A247)

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=12A15A1A247)
---
| | |
---
| | Lenient Judges continually release bad guys back onto our street, liberal politicians trip over themselves to cater to criminals, and a growing disrespect for law and order and a clear-cut air of hostility towards the NYPD are clearly disturbing trends.

Politicians pandering to the left are jeopardizing public safety with pro-criminal policies and we need to fix it. But under one party rule in our city, our state and our representation in Washington, it will only get worse before it gets better.

That’s why I’m running for Congress to be New York City’s [only voice of reason on the federal level.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=12A15A1A122)

[Stand with me, so I can continue to stand with the NYPD and have a better platform to fight back.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=12A15A1A122)

Sincerely,
Nicole

name: Corky Messner
subject: RSVP: Upcoming Veterans Events
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
From a young age, I felt the calling to serve our nation. I am proud to have attended and graduated from West Point, and to have served as an Army Ranger during the Cold War.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2a94a9fcf6a96a85/22d3eeec7526cde3c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,

From a young age, I felt the calling to serve our nation. I am proud to have attended and graduated from West Point, and to have served as an Army Ranger during the Cold War.

I am also the proud father of two current West Point cadets.

I’m running to once again serve our nation... and to stand up and speak out for America’s active duty military and veterans in the U.S. Senate.

**Today, we are letting our veterans down. And it is absolutely unacceptable.**

**[Tap or click here to watch a video I’ve recorded](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2a94a9fcf6a96a85/0fafd2f0f46615d0c3d6b838967d376c/33153 "Click here to watch. ")**. We’re launching a sustained campaign leading up to Veterans Day 2019, to highlight how our federal government is falling short, and what we must do to fulfill our responsibility to our veterans. [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2a94a9fcf6a96a85/42565a812f406168c3d6b838967d376c/33153) We all know by now how gross mismanagement of the VA has been a DISASTER for our nation’s veterans.

We need reform our VA healthcare system, so that our veterans get the quality care they deserve and require in a timely manner. Enough is enough of this systemic failure.

Our New Hampshire veterans SHOULD NOT have to make a long drive out-of-state to receive care. They should be able to see quality specialists right here in the Granite State.

**My campaign is also launching two big veterans events that I want to personally invite you to attend. See below for the details.** | |
---
**Cigars with Vets at Federal Cigar in Portsmouth
**
DATE: Saturday, November 9th
TIME: 5:00PM
LOCATION: Federal Cigar, Portsmouth
ADDRESS: Corner of Ladd & Market St. Portsmouth, NH 03801
RSVP: [https://messner-cigars-with-vets.eventbrite.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2a94a9fcf6a96a85/b8c093f951b1de8ac3d6b838967d376c/33153 "Click here to RSVP")
|
---
**Corky Messner Veterans Appreciation Pancake Breakfast**

DATE: Monday November 11th - Veterans Day
TIME: 8:00AM - 10:00AM
LOCATION: American Legion Jutras Post 43 Manchester NH
ADDRESS: 56 Boutwell St, Manchester, NH 03102
RSVP: [https://messner-veterans-pancake-breakfast.eventbrite.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2a94a9fcf6a96a85/9b89d29001f2ade2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
I’m proud to have defended liberty by guarding the Iron Curtain. And I’m proud of every single man and woman who has responded to the call to serve our nation.

**[Please join us for Veterans Day](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2a94a9fcf6a96a85/460b2be2cec1763cc3d6b838967d376c/33153 "Click here to learn more.")**. It will be my honor and privilege to see you there honoring our veterans.

\- Corky

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 'Coup Has Started,' Whistleblower's Attorney Said in 2017
body:
"Mark Zaid, one of the attorneys representing the intelligence community whistleblower at the center of the Democrats' ongoing impeachment..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c1fc12110&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **'Coup Has Started,' Whistleblower's Attorney Said in 2017**

“Mark Zaid, one of the attorneys representing the intelligence community whistleblower at the center of the Democrats' ongoing impeachment inquiry, tweeted conspicuously in January 2017 that a ‘coup has started’ and that ‘impeachment will follow ultimately,’” Gregg Re reports for Fox News.

Zaid also predicted via tweet that “CNN will play a key role in @realDonaldTrump not finishing out his full term as president,” and told his followers amid a flurry of impeachment-related posts that “‘as one falls, two more will take their place,’ apparently referring to Trump administration employees who defy the White House.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3d740afee6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “A national economic optimism index of small business owners is at its highest level ever, up 162% since the final months of President Obama’s two terms,” Paul Bedard reports in the [_**Washington Examiner**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e906ab7c45&e=3ee4985eea). “When owners are asked a broad question about their financial outlook ‘for your business’ over the next year, 77% say they are more optimistic than pessimistic,” the survey added.
---
|
---
| “As the hours of transcripts of witnesses in the Ukraine impeachment inquiry rack up and continue to underwhelm, Democrats and their allies in the media have seized on a new tactic. The old, archaic term ‘quid pro quo,’ is about to go the way of the Dodo. In its place the terms ‘extortion’ and ‘bribery’ will fly about like hot air balloons in California wine country,” David Marcus writes in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85da2bd67d&e=3ee4985eea). One big reason for that: A new Morning Consult poll shows support for impeachment has dropped 4 points.
---
|
---
| “Visiting Morocco for the first time, Ivanka Trump received a warm welcome Thursday from women in a region of the country where they are benefiting from changes that allow them to own land,” Darlene Superville reports for [_**The Associated Press**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8f0ee8e052&e=3ee4985eea).

“When you invest in women, they invest back into their families and communities and countries flourish,” Ivanka Trump said.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=10deb9ca59&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=02d64f01b7&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ac5646397f)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Team Mahony
subject: BREAKING: 400,000 more without insurance
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting
body:
What's best for our children is best for our state, and this is terrible news.

| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191107hcuninsured-a&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.com/page/m/4ea09d6f/382d5bd5/7089fba/3b075442/852142029/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoibWFob255LW5vdiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0xOTExMDdoY3VuaW5zdXJlZC1hIn0%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191107hcuninsured-a&recurring=auto") **Help Josh protect healthcare for thousands of children in Arkansas:** [PITCH IN](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191107hcuninsured-a&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Friend,

CNN reported that 400,000 more children are uninsured since 2016.

Tom Cotton cracked a wry smirk when he read this headline. Ok, we don't know that, but we do know he will stop at nothing to strip healthcare away from millions, including children -- and that is abhorrent. He votes in lockstep with National Republicans as they bend over backwards to push their anti-health care agenda on Americans and their families.

**[We cannot afford another six years of Tom Cotton bowing to right-wing special interest groups that want to take healthcare away from millions of Americans. Will you chip in $10 or more to reach our rapid response goal of $5,000 to protect healthcare for our children?](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191107hcuninsured-a&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate $5](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em191107hcuninsured-a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $10](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em191107hcuninsured-a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $25](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em191107hcuninsured-a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em191107hcuninsured-a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $100](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em191107hcuninsured-a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Donate Other Amount](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?refcode=em191107hcuninsured-a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=") This statistic makes it clear that Tom Cotton will not work for the people of Arkansas -- he will work for the rich and powerful and the special interests.

We can't sit back and watch Republicans win this race again. It's crucial that we start investing in this campaign today so we can get organized and beat Tom Cotton and the special interests fighting against us.

**[Pitch in $10 now to help us stay on track towards our goal and show Tom Cotton and Mitch McConnell that Arkansas is ready to elect a real leader to the Senate.](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191107hcuninsured-a&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you for being in this fight,

Team Mahony

subject: BIG news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We have great news - the Indiana Chamber of Commerce named Governor Holcomb their 2019 Government Leader of the Year! | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6d1fc25fa00842f3a205f64e0297ea09&_e=1FMWYX4CfMfdKzsGgvmtaXJjfWg1kR1VCv2uWMmrEy8gXIIRXzMdexTH1Jrpi2E-4EBdR3KEyXGJPY4ndkURJDUI7i7UXt5_9b5PkhwlbhSSevaxXLMNZHk39KiJarKdrNnbReC6W1twSiyrfNj6R04ltIuiB3cs6uEhikzcapKF_Or9RJPVAhlLYU1yQAEt7NYfuBXf8E8Hd6hccaiG__nZq-pbPwZo4B5ZJ2qt5eKChK0d5q4NeFNnL48wHyeXAXRXDRVmLNsWCXTCvl7Q9W1oFBVNoHk87p8LIqOqXRwtX6DzUJX4syrKLkTQkvSNGXW44AXW2aFDR__W-nl-kJvf7cpnlum0ChDlRnbJW051VOtkTykZsv6CmBo3H0WPM6IY3L0MlW-fB3OMvqmOrG8AnOquhbih5ec3kGPGjxw%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

**It’s a big week for Governor Holcomb** — he’ll be receiving the Indiana Chamber of Commerce’s 2019 Government Leader of the Year Award!

The Indiana Chamber is honoring Governor Holcomb for the results he’s delivering while Putting People First every day — especially when it comes to skilling-up our workforce and helping Hoosiers recover from addiction.

**[Friend, we want to surprise the Governor by showing him a card with all of your signatures on it - will you help us? ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6d1fc25fa00842f3a205f64e0297ea09&_e=1FMWYX4CfMfdKzsGgvmtaXJjfWg1kR1VCv2uWMmrEy8gXIIRXzMdexTH1Jrpi2E-4EBdR3KEyXGJPY4ndkURJDUI7i7UXt5_9b5PkhwlbhSSevaxXLMNZHk39KiJarKdrNnbReC6W1twSiyrfNj6R04ltIuiB3cs6uEhikzcapKF_Or9RJPVAhlLYU1yQAEt7NYfuBXf8E8Hd6hccaiG_4jKyfS-J6G9shpngOp1aZvKrEt6n4w_MV_5nxrZIAoLcDdjygqg8x0MzxKTu2YykyPr7lwhw0efW0SEY2aVymDVlbrArse28x70hyerzq5hn8A4BqvFgxyudVzWAaspNJOOJPuAXxTEPxCKO4sn77aZJ7Hfgf_Ww6AJoPleWeD66Qp-nrfDFfi2yYRJ9gadON7TiPptbaNXLTXNdn0UC5A%3D)**
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6d1fc25fa00842f3a205f64e0297ea09&_e=1FMWYX4CfMfdKzsGgvmtaXJjfWg1kR1VCv2uWMmrEy8gXIIRXzMdexTH1Jrpi2E-4EBdR3KEyXGJPY4ndkURJDUI7i7UXt5_9b5PkhwlbhSSevaxXLMNZHk39KiJarKdrNnbReC6W1twSiyrfNj6R04ltIuiB3cs6uEhikzcapKF_Or9RJPVAhlLYU1yQAEt7NYfuBXf8E8Hd6hccaiG_6vh9C429OfD13ytMPZ8B9SqcR-R8on9hI84_iNU5aRbQQHQYxEY73J004Mn_Q4cAZFX1Zr1sc70WDJEwJwirOzz4oikQcc8DpSfJxdK7sFKTHGlugPLBLpZOnWDSHQ3L5lnqdRDUIHwaeMbGET9IHn9OEdmNeCq3mIyCje-2uhEAy1V20AA88QW06OMCDdgtR2eXHVn9t6uMV3cGgOYpms%3D)
Since taking office, Governor Holcomb has led the fight against addiction in the workplace, pushed through legislation expanding rural broadband and long-term road funding, and helped Indiana’s workforce acquire the skills they need to compete in the 21st century through the Next Level Jobs program.

We’re proud of the Governor and can’t wait to see what he can do with four more years of Putting People First. **[If you want to join us in congratulating Governor Holcomb on winning Leader of the Year, please consider signing our card>> ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6d1fc25fa00842f3a205f64e0297ea09&_e=1FMWYX4CfMfdKzsGgvmtaXJjfWg1kR1VCv2uWMmrEy8gXIIRXzMdexTH1Jrpi2E-4EBdR3KEyXGJPY4ndkURJDUI7i7UXt5_9b5PkhwlbhSSevaxXLMNZHk39KiJarKdrNnbReC6W1twSiyrfNj6R04ltIuiB3cs6uEhikzcapKF_Or9RJPVAhlLYU1yQAEt7NYfuBXf8E8Hd6hccaiG_yGm5lhj7IedU_oLG3Tnj-MIEKY1NzyRKbXEvB5AzeKNmDtksU7fY1c-2URHEca1rujUscoyVv-MCflgUnKeCQpTlZS0Y9SnQdhGAlFgFJgjryzS1iQ1Qw95kD295hyaPqC8DfMa8iQ2QR9JQN8NkP9X0RlzLJ2Tyw4AZSkT5_G33UA-PfUNOJL1SAXEMWCb0jnAEmB5Of7ZANHAIACeYr0%3D)**
[ **Sign Our Card and Congratulate Governor Holcomb** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6d1fc25fa00842f3a205f64e0297ea09&_e=1FMWYX4CfMfdKzsGgvmtaXJjfWg1kR1VCv2uWMmrEy8gXIIRXzMdexTH1Jrpi2E-4EBdR3KEyXGJPY4ndkURJDUI7i7UXt5_9b5PkhwlbhSSevaxXLMNZHk39KiJarKdrNnbReC6W1twSiyrfNj6R04ltIuiB3cs6uEhikzcapKF_Or9RJPVAhlLYU1yQAEt7NYfuBXf8E8Hd6hccaiG_ws_8fw_IIo1O3Rg137xxoO9fFzkdF9U9zzgcOeAbu4UhHBOTRprv8jvgEypxBTbniurgL3vEF0l922FUx0v4axteln1QHhobBPpYF3qpplLccfB6Hs6mgwiG5g6V7m_VTE7oTrUXKLc7TyYy_elDwQqJ4Pp9VlVBPn0Sw6w57tGsHkNgw8oud6JwcyICPdXUWxleR0PPVixFCFtlTKd96I%3D)
