name: Mark Warner
subject: I want to thank every Virginian
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
On Tuesday night, our Commonwealth spoke loud and clear. This is a victory for everyone who believes in decency, access to affordable health care, and an economy that delivers for every Virginian.
|
---
| | Dear Derek,

On Tuesday night, our Commonwealth spoke loud and clear. This is a victory for everyone who believes in decency, access to affordable health care, and an economy that delivers for every Virginian. Virginians across the political spectrum stood up and made it clear they will reward honest and effective leadership that focuses on results and our shared Virginia values.

As I traveled Virginia over the last year, holding 56 events for 81 of our General Assembly candidates across the Commonwealth, it was apparent that Democrats' focus on health care, education, and economic opportunity were a far greater mobilizing factor than the gridlock and divisive rhetoric coming out of Donald Trump's Washington.

When I was elected Governor in 2001, the Commonwealth looked a lot different than it does today. In many ways, the Democratic Party of Virginia was in the wilderness, after years of one-party Republican control at the state and federal level.

Through the relentless efforts of so many men and women who stood up to serve, whether in elective office or as volunteers and staff, we have rebuilt this party and this Commonwealth. Leaders like Senator Kaine and Congressman Scott have been there every step of the way. Governors McAuliffe and Northam have led and continued advancing Virginia. And new leaders have stepped up to continue this fight - like our incredible freshmen Congresswomen Elaine Luria, Abigail Spanberger, and Jennifer Wexton, as well as our leadership in the General Assembly that over the last three years has built our strongest majority in a generation and the most diverse caucus in Virginia history.

Today we stand in a Virginia whose elected officials reflect our Commonwealth's values and its rich diversity more than ever. Years of hard work have led to a Democratic majority and the chance to increase economic opportunity for all Virginians, to continue to expand access to quality affordable health care, and to enact commonsense gun reform that keeps our communities safe.

I want to thank every Virginian who has put in the hard work that made Tuesday night's victory possible. But we also need to recognize that our work does not end on Election Day, that we have a responsibility to lead and get results, and that victory today does not guarantee the same results tomorrow. Together we have made incredible progress, but our work continues, and I'm planning to put in the hard work necessary to carry this progress into 2020 and the years to come.

Sincerely,
Mark Warner

body:

The establishment said I was a longshot. **You helped me prove them all wrong.** **[_But the reality is: If I don 't make the next debate, everything we've worked for will be jeopardized, and everyone who counted us out will go unchallenged. That's how important your help is in this critical moment. Will you rush $5 to get me to that next debate stage before time runs out? >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191107_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191107_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80c/3eb3e2fc/562b774c/744d973c/907486013/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80c/3eb3e2fc/562b774c/744d973b/907486013/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). Friend, here's the latest on the state of this race – **We've hit the ground running.** Our endorsements from Victory Fund and The Collective PAC helped us spread the word and grow our grassroots movement. And our strong end-of-month campaign helped us bank much-needed resources that will support that growth. That being said, **we can't slow down for _one second._** That's because, as you read this, two opponents have _already_ jumped into this primary. This field is already getting crowded, which means we need to lay a strong foundation **now** to remain the front-runner. **[_Will you make a gift to make sure we have the resources we need to stay competitive?_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/5AA/ni0YAA/t.2wi/AQ4JDRSkQua-nv9AaYIQyQ/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODIDfDRhzA84w7dFOhlfBM-2BeF59lNC-2B4qAzj1-2B9t-2BAvrDw4Rw7Dy66mYH5exStWOlanX3PH6FwShU1211lIwl-2FojxcgqNDL-2FSm098PzPiNWdu-2BE8CQYZ5bIshCzDJfcHOI7Oe1AkLRNfq-2FHx1QYO19EmNzGKU-2F49MUBmdMk9DGDzlccq2BbDbIy-2BVzQXWML10STuiZe1W-2F8So1-2FXCmubhfO7auKV7ucEgmmStI6BWAqHPUvuzpITVwGpMirrxyJ26Yy/P4pb)** [Donate, friend](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/5AA/ni0YAA/t.2wi/AQ4JDRSkQua-nv9AaYIQyQ/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODIDfDRhzA84w7dFOhlfBM-2BeF59lNC-2B4qAzj1-2B9t-2BAvrDxd0xoFm4JRc3y-2FueKt9SoP5r5SwbXc9rKPcVei9eYLkiNG0G-2Bi82j9RLP2-2FI4-2FuOn-2Fmwu140c-2BGhxIzv1baO2MjlPLmBZP2TLqWRbyGLDIKDnEZAZn4mMlbIpGgwnIKI3hOMp9Fal5lB2lnrP2-2Btzv6BT-2F5Xvzd03tTeKvNlyCjBq1OOaUl4TZ0EGl5Vv8Ccsk1FZUxbKPZsAvD6wMGD4E/TUY3) Overall, our team expects that we may wind up with as many as **6 candidates running against us** in this race – and that's just in the Democratic primary, which doesn't count the Republicans we know are going to make a play to flip this seat. We're going to be fighting this battle on multiple fronts, which means we're going to need as many of you standing with us as possible to help us spread the word, build support, and fight back against the attacks that we know are coming. The more we raise now, early on, the stronger our campaign's foundation will be. **[_Can you make a gift to help us keep this momentum up and ensure we can remain the front-runner in this race?_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/5AA/ni0YAA/t.2wi/AQ4JDRSkQua-nv9AaYIQyQ/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODIDfDRhzA84w7dFOhlfBM-2BeF59lNC-2B4qAzj1-2B9t-2BAvrDzy6CtT-2Bm42BEcElNLosGB7oSi6gxQNBccISp-2FGTt0lOQeBbSGmKql1XkuMsD5rN-2BFost1SYwllUwLPXBgxWDKfAzHAokKxyb6YH9MxGcj036pea1TD-2FubHAtB0xqTWTcrHNm2LdWPy6y3P400XuUgiMjiLkYE-2FRVRog0qaBjN-2FwHKRNF83hz8v80PAruh-2FwDBqU641eqsnFBFCkbtMkdkN/8S9t)** Thank you. name: Chris Finello
subject: We’re still behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
Peter -- since I wrote you this morning, we’ve only raised $340, and we cannot afford to miss our target.

If you pitch in now, I know we can flip this seat and put an end to Brian Fitzpatrick’s time in Congress. PA-01 is a "toss up," and it’s one of just two seats still held by a Republican running for re-election that Hillary Clinton won in 2016 \-- and both Gov. Wolf and Sen. Casey carried the district in 2018 \-- so we know Democrats win here.

But without your support, this is going to be a whole lot harder to win.

I’m asking you personally to step up and help us turn this seat from red to blue by pitching in whatever you can right now, because this race is too important to lose. You can give at this link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finelloforcongress**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11641623/118729347/2063951955?refcode=CFN20191107b&refcode2=fmbpZRudtGMASKklHhvb&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTdjODcxZS1iNTAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L44ChVhYOaYHpg32-Bdw2oNhd-FVEU7wwWVW6whzK_4=)

Your support of my race means the world to me and my family.

Best,
Chris

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Healthcare cannot be a partisan toy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The run-up to the 2020 Democratic primary has heavily featured the candidates' differing plans to achieve our shared healthcare goals: ensuring that every American is covered, that healthcare costs don't bankrupt our families, and that we get the treatment we deserve. MEANWHILE, the GOP is doing everything it can to undermine the progress we've made. They've never stopped trying to repeal the ACA in Congress AND in the courts, leaving no safety net for people with pre-existing conditions and harming the health of millions. The only reason we didn't lose our healthcare in 2017 was that America spoke up and flooded congressional offices with calls and emails and letters demanding their representatives and senators do their jobs and not play political games with our healthcare. [**But we are at another turning point -- and we need everyone to stand up and make their voices heard if we 're going to finally make healthcare a human right in this country. If you agree that we need to stop treating healthcare like a political pawn, then please add your name to ours.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc14/6e9863e8/16316479/1db09fe7/332532556/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/medicareforall/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc14/6e9863e8/16316479/1db09fe7/332532556/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/medicareforall/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

name: Michael Bennet
subject: We can beat Trump and make progress for the next generation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
but we can't do it by selling the American people empty promises | |
---
| Team --

Yesterday I officially filed to be on the ballot in New Hampshire. This is a major step on the road to our victory, and I couldn't have done it without the support of grassroots backers like you, friend.

While there, I spoke with the top TV station, WMUR, about why I'm the candidate who can beat Donald Trump. Here's what I said:

[For starters: I'm the only person in this race who has won two federal races in a purple battleground state.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2ac/2016007725/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

That's exactly why I'm concerned about the Democratic Party's lurch to a set of policies that are good for raising money on the internet, but are never going to happen.

[I won't spend the next 10 years fighting a losing battle for Medicare for All when we need to have an economy that actually works for everybody in America.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2ac/2016007725/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Team, this campaign is about the vast majority of voters who are looking for a compelling and unifying vision for our future. If you're ready to create real solutions, not empty promises, join me and this campaign today! >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2a3/2016007725/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2a2/2016007725/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2a1/2016007725/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2a0/2016007725/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
[The truth is that we never should have lost to Trump in 2016.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2ac/2016007725/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

If we set ourselves up in a position where the agenda we're pursuing is not one that unifies the American people, but creates further division in the country, we know Trump will win.

I think Warren and Sanders' Medicare for All plan is unpassable.

They're proposing that Democrats run on a platform that only one-third of Democrats support, much less those we need to win back to beat Trump.

[_I think that 's a big mistake._](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2ac/2016007725/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**We will win this election the same way we always have: by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for the future. Will you join me today, friend? >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2a7/2016007725/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2a2/2016007725/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2a1/2016007725/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2a0/2016007725/VEsHBw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
[I'm better situated than all of my competitors to beat Trump and lead our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2ac/2016007725/VEsHBg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I've worked at the local level as superintendent of the Denver public school system - my budget was three times bigger than Buttigieg's city budget.

I've also spent 10 years in the Senate, representing a state that's only one-third Democrat, spearheading some of the most important bipartisan discussions that we have had - on immigration, on health care, and on education.

_I 've been at the center of all of those battles, friend._

[We're announcing endorsements and expanding our operation in New Hampshire because I'm going to be in this until the very end.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2ac/2016007725/VEsHAQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[So if you care about solutions, not slogans, will you join me in supporting my campaign? Our average online gift has been $29, but any amount will help fuel this campaign to victory! >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2a7/2016007725/VEsHAA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2a7/2016007725/VEsHAw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Together,

Michael

P.S. You can read the full WMUR story [here](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae64/134673f2/a6e8a34/6997c2a6/2016007725/VEsHAg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://www.wmur.com/article/live-michael-bennet-filing-for-nh-primary-at-state-house/29713965")!

Hi Peter,

The climate crisis is a massive, existential problem that demands far more attention than it gets — and that’s why I’m running for Congress.

**The evidence is clear and incredibly frightening, so[action must be taken now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11642833/118744849/748289614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTczZjVkOC1iYzAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BaEtWZG2dSiHl6Hv2XsueH6ww8Z98ik5tSAGscJzers=&emci=c82c496a-b201-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=9a73f5d8-bc01-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6767893)** to address the impact that climate change has on our economy, infrastructure, and the everyday lives of Floridians.

**We simply cannot stay silent about this and must demand our representative in Washington join us in taking urgent, bipartisan action.[Join me in signing my campaign’s petition to demand action from Congress to combat climate change.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11642834/118744850/748289614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTczZjVkOC1iYzAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BaEtWZG2dSiHl6Hv2XsueH6ww8Z98ik5tSAGscJzers=&emci=c82c496a-b201-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=9a73f5d8-bc01-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6767893)**

Future generations of Floridians are depending on us to plan for what lies ahead. As hurricanes continue to get stronger and stronger, many citizens feel that our government isn’t doing enough to address the impacts.

Plain and simple: Florida deserves better.

[**If you agree, please join me in signing my campaign’s petition to demand members of Congress to take action now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11642835/118744851/748289614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTczZjVkOC1iYzAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BaEtWZG2dSiHl6Hv2XsueH6ww8Z98ik5tSAGscJzers=&emci=c82c496a-b201-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=9a73f5d8-bc01-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6767893)
| [Sign the petition now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11642836/118744852/748289614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTczZjVkOC1iYzAxLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BaEtWZG2dSiHl6Hv2XsueH6ww8Z98ik5tSAGscJzers=&emci=c82c496a-b201-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=9a73f5d8-bc01-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6767893)

-Adam

_Adam Hattersley is Navy Veteran and local state representative working to flip Florida's 15th Congressional District._

subject: I can't believe it- Thank you!
body:
We're on to another week of DWTS, and its thanks to you all | |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b44cdbd9eb&e=f6564bbe3b) | [Share](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6dc3a8f1a6&e=f6564bbe3b)

---|---
|
## We’re in the quarterfinals!
---
|
---
|
---
---
| | Monday night totally blew me away. I knew I had a lot of people supporting and voting for me, but it’s humbling to know it was enough to send me onto the quarterfinals next week.

It means a lot that so many people have enjoyed seeing me in this competition and have taken the time to send in votes for me on their Monday night.

I wouldn’t be this far along without the outstanding coaching of my partner Lindsay. My thoughts and prayers are with her and her family as they mourn the sudden loss of a family member. I was honored to have her lifelong friend Jenna step in and guide me through the night.

We're back this week learning two brand new dances for the next show. We're rehearsing as much as possible to master the new styles to continue to improve our scores and earn your votes.
---
| Again, thanks everyone,

_Sean_

clean_body: We're on to another week of DWTS, and its thanks to you all | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | We’re in the quarterfinals! | | | | Monday night totally blew me away. I knew I had a lot of people supporting and voting for me, but it’s humbling to know it was enough to send me onto the quarterfinals next week. It means a lot that so many people have enjoyed seeing me in this competition and have taken the time to send in votes for me on their Monday night. I wouldn’t be this far along without the outstanding coaching of my partner Lindsay. My thoughts and prayers are with her and her family as they mourn the sudden loss of a family member. I was honored to have her lifelong friend Jenna step in and guide me through the night. We're back this week learning two brand new dances for the next show. We're rehearsing as much as possible to master the new styles to continue to improve our scores and earn your votes. | Again, thanks everyone, Sean | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2019 RigWil LLC, All rights reserved.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: [SURVEY] What's on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Will you take this quick survey to let me know what's on your mind for this campaign? Your input helps shape our campaign strategy. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377147a/691c9bd/6ff0a46b/11a7fa00/3628982294/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend--traveling the state, I hear so many reasons why Coloradans want new leadership in Washington. From the start, I've built my public service on listening as much as I talk.

I intend to put Colorado's priorities first in the United States Senate--and one of the ways you can help me do that is to share what's most important to you in this race.

[**_Will you take this quick survey to let me know what 's on your mind for this campaign? Your input helps shape our campaign strategy._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377147a/691c9bd/6ff0a46b/11a7fa01/3628982294/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMTgzMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://jhfp.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/let-john-know-what-s-on-your-mind?source=em_surv_20191107_JH_20191107-surv-JH-priorities-all_all&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&zip=18326")

Tuesday's election results in so many parts of the country have me feeling optimistic about our chances next year. If we come together, we can end Mitch McConnell's majority, take back the Senate, and get our priorities back on the table in Washington. I can't wait to read your responses!

Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_surv_20191107_JH_20191107-surv-JH-priorities-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377147a/691c9bd/6ff0a46b/11a7fa3f/3628982294/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377147a/691c9bd/6ff0a46b/11a7fa3c/3628982294/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377147a/691c9bd/6ff0a46b/11a7fa3d/3628982294/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377147a/691c9bd/6ff0a46b/11a7fa3a/3628982294/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377147a/691c9bd/6ff0a46b/11a7fa3b/3628982294/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Tuesday showed us something
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Tuesday's election results showed us that folks all over the country are ready for change.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890854/7f51f7bc/4bce33e8/4ef0b217/3759309328/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, I hope you'll give me 60 seconds to explain why donating right now is so critical. But if you're already with me, you can pitch in here: **[https://www.mjfortexas.com/beatcornyn](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890854/7f51f7bc/4bce33e8/4ef0b216/3759309328/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-beatcornyn?refcode=email_20191107.1nd__482__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Tuesday's election results showed us that folks all over the country are ready for change, and after spending the last six months on the campaign trail, I can tell you this: **Texas is ready, too.** It's not going to be easy, but I've never backed down from a tough fight. I know we can do this -- but only if we're in it together.

**[Will you chip in now to help build the Texas-sized campaign we need to beat Sen. Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890854/7f51f7bc/4bce33e8/4ef0b216/3759309328/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-beatcornyn?refcode=email_20191107.1nd__482__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We've got the enthusiasm and momentum to beat Sen. Cornyn. But he's an entrenched incumbent who's spent almost two decades in Washington serving the special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell, who are going to pour money into Texas to prop him up.

If we're going to stay on track and build a campaign that can compete with Sen. Cornyn and WIN next November, **[I need you in my corner.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890854/7f51f7bc/4bce33e8/4ef0b216/3759309328/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-beatcornyn?refcode=email_20191107.1nd__482__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Here's what we're up against:
* Sen. Cornyn has already aired the first TV ads of the campaign
* He's got a nearly $11 million war chest funded by millions in corporate PAC money
* A super PAC has raised over _$9 million_ to help buy his reelection

Here's the deal: I don't have any corporate PACs propping up my campaign, hoping I'll play nice with them once I'm Senator. I'm not taking their money because I will be accountable to the people, not special interests. **That 's why I need you with me. Will you pitch in right now so we can build the campaign we need to win Texas?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890854/7f51f7bc/4bce33e8/4ef0b215/3759309328/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-beatcornyn?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191107.1nd__482__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890854/7f51f7bc/4bce33e8/4ef0b214/3759309328/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-beatcornyn?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191107.1nd__482__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890854/7f51f7bc/4bce33e8/4ef0b20b/3759309328/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-beatcornyn?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191107.1nd__482__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890854/7f51f7bc/4bce33e8/4ef0b20a/3759309328/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-beatcornyn?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191107.1nd__482__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890854/7f51f7bc/4bce33e8/4ef0b209/3759309328/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-beatcornyn?refcode=email_20191107.1nd__482__")**
Thanks for everything,

MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890854/7f51f7bc/4bce33e8/4ef0b216/3759309328/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-beatcornyn?refcode=email_20191107.1nd__482__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: humbly asking;
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I will never forget it. One year ago -- Democrats won unprecedented victories across this country to restore order to the people's House. Having led that movement is one of my proudest moments. Together, we elected the most diverse Congress in history. Together, we took back the House. **And one year from now -- I 'm going to help Democrats TAKE BACK Mitch McConnell's Senate, too.** It's going to take hard work. It's going to take people across the country demanding change. Are you with me? I need 593 Democrats to step up on this momentous day to ensure we WIN my race and REMOVE McConnell from power: | [](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191107_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
[ _**Suggested Support: $5 >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191107_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
---

Our victory last year was historic. Together, we took back the House to elect the youngest, most diverse, most female-powered Congress in history.

But we're not done yet. One year from now, I want to TAKE BACK the Senate, too.

**Today, more than ever, I need to know you have my back and will defend our once-in-a-lifetime shot to clinch that same victory in the Senate.**

I'm humbly asking: Will you rush $5 to WIN my race and WIN the Senate?

| ****[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191107_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****
---

****[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191107_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")****
---

****[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191107_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")****
---

****[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191107_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")****
---

****[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191107_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****
---

Thank you,

Ben Ray Lujan

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b43d/18e32a7f/53c19103/7b22ea50/3166311433/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b43d/18e32a7f/53c19103/7b22ea51/3166311433/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b43d/18e32a7f/53c19103/7b22ea56/3166311433/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b43d/18e32a7f/53c19103/7b22ea57/3166311433/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b43d/18e32a7f/53c19103/7b22ea54/3166311433/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b43d/18e32a7f/53c19103/7b22ea55/3166311433/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.
---

name: Robert, Turner for Congress
subject: FWD: No more Schiff! No more impeachment!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDEwNjMwMDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY0MDYxNzIxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Have you signed onto our petition yet? Team Turner is sending a petition with hundreds of names to Adam Schiff over his political, closed door impeachment proceedings.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=NDEwNjMwMDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDYxNzIxMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

Peter—

With our primary election coming up in just four months, it’s crucial for our campaign to continue to develop a solid grassroots foundation so that we can respond to the attacks against us.

I won’t be deterred from fighting for pragmatic solutions for Illinoisans, but I need to know that you’re with me.

Will you step up and rush a contribution before our deadline at midnight? We have a budget gap of $920.

Thanks for helping!

— Dan
Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Here's why the "People's Pledge" matters to me and why it should matter to you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363908bb/55b66746/2cda9832/80f2969/3723577330/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | The basic premise of democracy is that the people have the power. But in the halls of Congress today, powerful special interests drown out the people. Our elections are too often awash in dark money--money from corporate titans, ideological special interests, and self-interested billionaires. We can fix that. And we can start right now. There are three Democrats running for the US Senate in Massachusetts in 2020. The question is: _Will we agree to a People's Pledge to ensure that the people have the power?_ **As of this moment, Shannon Liss-Riordan and I are ready to sign on the dotted line. But we're waiting on Senator Ed Markey.** Back in 2013, Mr. Markey called on his opponent to take the pledge, saying it would stop the "tsunami of politically polluted money that swept across all of the rest of the United States." That was true in 2013, and it's even more true today. **Here's what you can do right now:[ Make a small donation to our campaign. Every amount counts. ](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363908bb/55b66746/2cda9832/80f296a/3723577330/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-07-peoplespledge&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** What matters to me is how many people participate. **Even better, your donation will fund our organizers who are hitting the streets and organizing town-by-town, block-by-block, person-by-person.** We can start fixing our democracy right now. It starts with you. [**Chip in what you can.**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363908bb/55b66746/2cda9832/80f296a/3723577330/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-07-peoplespledge&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363908bb/55b66746/2cda9832/80f296b/3723577330/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-11-07-peoplespledge&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363908bb/55b66746/2cda9832/80f2974/3723577330/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-11-07-peoplespledge&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363908bb/55b66746/2cda9832/80f2975/3723577330/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-11-07-peoplespledge&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363908bb/55b66746/2cda9832/80f2976/3723577330/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-11-07-peoplespledge&refcode2=express-buttons")

subject: RE: Tulsi Gabbard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I need to be completely honest here: **Tulsi Gabbard just secured her spot on the next Demcoratic debate stage.** And I might not make the cut. [**_I 've been counted out by the press from the start. But the only way I've been able to break through and spread my message is on that debate stage. I'm asking for your immediate $5 to make the next cut before time runs out. We cannot let the media decide the winners of this race. >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191107_em_fr_b2_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I mean every word I'm about to say: I will never stop speaking truth to power, no matter how much the press counts me out because of it. **If 1,238 Democrats step up for me before midnight, we 'll show everyone who ever tried to silence us what a real movement looks like.** Will you rush $5 to get me to the next debates? No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80e/3eb3e2fc/56335aab/744d979b/3913975965/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80e/3eb3e2fc/56335aab/744d979a/3913975965/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80e/3eb3e2fc/56335aab/744d9799/3913975965/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Doug Jones
subject: Jeff Sessions is back in Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there--
I bet you didn't expect to hear this today: Jeff Sessions is back. CNN has reported he'll be throwing his name in against me for my Senate seat in Alabama next year.
[**If we want to keep fighting for our health care, equal rights, and so many more issues like election security, then I need your help. Will you please give $3 or more to make sure Maggie and I can stay in the Senate -- and make sure Jeff Sessions never sets foot on the Senate floor?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc329/2a380d31/3d447764/f0eb6f/2831747805/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0am9uZXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTEwN19NV0g0REpfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jones?refcode=e20191107_MWH4DJ_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
But before you think Jeff Sessions is just going to walk back into the Senate, I have some good news. Yes, the national media has identified my seat as the Republicans' top target for next year. But we're in a great position. We had an outstanding third quarter for fundraising and our recent polling shows I'm leading every one of my challengers.
We know how to win this. The playbook isn't a secret. Alabama has put unity over extremism before when we made history in 2017. That wasn't a fluke. We can and will come together and win this again, but we need your help.
[**We've seen what we can do when we come together. Can I count on your support? Please, chip in $3 or more today to help me and Maggie keep working for you in the Senate.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc329/2a380d31/3d447764/f0eb6f/2831747805/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0am9uZXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTEwN19NV0g0REpfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jones?refcode=e20191107_MWH4DJ_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Mitch McConnell is getting desperate. He knows my challengers are struggling, so he's gone back to the well to find someone who's quite frankly one of the most extreme, divisive people to ever run for Senate. That's not what we need right now, especially with all the chaos in Washington.
We don't need another hyper-partisan like Jeff Sessions in the Senate. We need to come together and actually start getting things done. Remember how the Senate STILL hasn't voted on the Equality Act? Or preventing the Russians from meddling in our elections? It would only be worse with Jeff Sessions back in Washington.
[**Chip in today and let's beat McConnell, Sessions, and their extremist agenda >>**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc329/2a380d31/3d447764/f0eb6f/2831747805/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0am9uZXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTEwN19NV0g0REpfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jones?refcode=e20191107_MWH4DJ_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
--Doug Jones
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc329/2a380d31/3d447764/f0eb6f/2831747805/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0am9uZXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTEwN19NV0g0REpfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jones?refcode=e20191107_MWH4DJ_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc329/2a380d31/3d447764/f0eb68/2831747805/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

subject: Trump is sinking in the polls as Dem candidates rise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, A flurry of polls have come out in recent days, and many of them point to one thing: leading Democratic candidates are beating Trump. Warren leads Trump by 15, Sanders leads by 14, and Biden leads by 17! We have a real shot at taking back the White House. This does not mean everything is smooth sailing, though \-- Democrats are neck and neck with Trump in key battleground states, and we've got less than a year 'til Election Day 2020, so we need to know where engaged Democrats stand NOW: **Which candidate are you going to vote for in 2020?** **[Bernie Sanders](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc17/6e9863e8/1632dff6/1db09feb/584311315/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/WdBueztx")** **[Elizabeth Warren](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc17/6e9863e8/1632dff6/1db09feb/584311315/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/WdBueztx")** **[Joe Biden](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc17/6e9863e8/1632dff6/1db09feb/584311315/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/WdBueztx")** **[Kamala Harris](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc17/6e9863e8/1632dff6/1db09feb/584311315/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/WdBueztx")** **[Pete Buttigieg](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc17/6e9863e8/1632dff6/1db09feb/584311315/VEsD/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/WdBueztx")** **[Donald Trump](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc17/6e9863e8/1632dff6/1db09feb/584311315/VEsA/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/WdBueztx")** **[Other](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc17/6e9863e8/1632dff6/1db09feb/584311315/VEsB/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/WdBueztx")** Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc17/6e9863e8/1632dff6/1db09fea/584311315/VEsO/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191107c.ND-b&refcode2=qs9ECO1iHWSlHp3cKatt")

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Alert: Jeff Sessions is running for US Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbf4/6cd27893/52189cba/1587972c/3439752006/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | We have a showdown in Alabama. In the red corner, the architect of Donald Trump's child separation policy -- his former attorney general, Jeff Sessions, who put Latino children in jails and helped Trump divide Americans on racial lines. In the blue corner, Senator Doug Jones, the man who won justice after four decades for the little African American girls killed by the KKK in a church bombing in Birmingham. The difference could not be more clear. [**will you help Doug Jones fight back now?**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbf4/6cd27893/52189cba/1587972d/3439752006/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-jones?refcode=2019-11-07-djones&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") With Trump by his side, Jeff Session championed a policy designed deliberately to harm childrenand demonize Latino immigrants-- for political gain. The cruelty was the point. And Doug? He's been working to improve health care, stand up for justice and opportunity, and is a living reminder in the Senate of how much our country must do to heal our racial divides. **If we're going to take back the Senate in 2020, we must defend Doug Jones. **With Jeff Sessions in the race, it's going to be the toughest, hardest, (and probably nastiest) fight in the country. [**Let's show Doug that we've got his back. Let's show the country whose side we're on. Stand up and chip in for Doug Jones right now.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbf4/6cd27893/52189cba/1587972d/3439752006/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-jones?refcode=2019-11-07-djones&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") _Jeff_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Doug Jones and Jeff Merkley instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbf4/6cd27893/52189cba/1587972a/3439752006/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-jones?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-11-07-djones&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbf4/6cd27893/52189cba/1587972b/3439752006/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-jones?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-11-07-djones&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbf4/6cd27893/52189cba/15879728/3439752006/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-jones?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-11-07-djones&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbf4/6cd27893/52189cba/15879729/3439752006/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-jones?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-11-07-djones&refcode2=express-buttons")

clean_body: | "" | | We have a showdown in Alabama. In the red corner, the architect of Donald Trump's child separation policy -- his former attorney general, Jeff Sessions, who put Latino children in jails and helped Trump divide Americans on racial lines. In the blue corner, Senator Doug Jones, the man who won justice after four decades for the little African American girls killed by the KKK in a church bombing in Birmingham. The difference could not be more clear. "" With Trump by his side, Jeff Session championed a policy designed deliberately to harm childrenand demonize Latino immigrants-- for political gain. The cruelty was the point. And Doug? He's been working to improve health care, stand up for justice and opportunity, and is a living reminder in the Senate of how much our country must do to heal our racial divides. If we're going to take back the Senate in 2020, we must defend Doug Jones. With Jeff Sessions in the race, it's going to be the toughest, hardest, (and probably nastiest) fight in the country. "" Jeff Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Doug Jones and Jeff Merkley instantly: | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. ---|--- | ""

All across Pennsylvania, people have demanded that they're tired of the status quo. They want big, structural change -- and have chipped in what they can to be a part of this movement.

The average first donation for people in Pennsylvania was $19 -- and it's thanks to people like them who gave whatever they could that prove you don't need millions of dollars in the bank to make an impact on our democracy.

**But to win back the White House and make Elizabeth the next President, we need to hit all of our fundraising goals as we move into 2020, and that starts with this week's $1 million goal.**

[**So can you help raise $1 million by the end of the week by chipping in just $19? name: 2020 Senate Watch
subject: we need to stop this Trump appointee running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0666/72412298/41919dd4/6103ca50/3816995389/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_191108_JeffSessions_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_191108_JeffSessions_U1_X1")

| | Peter, we need to protect Alabama Democrat Doug Jones. Former AG Jeff Sessions is expected to announce his plan to run for Senate TODAY. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter, we need to protect Alabama Democrat Doug Jones: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0666/72412298/41919dd4/6103ca53/3816995389/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9zcGxpdF9qb25lcyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMTkxMTA4X0plZmZTZXNzaW9uc19VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjI1In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_split_jones?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_191108_JeffSessions_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_191108_JeffSessions_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_191108_JeffSessions_U1_X1") Jeff Sessions has a long history of homophobia, racism, and opposition to civil rights legislation. He's running on a pro-Trump and anti-impeachment agenda -- **And he just might win. Doug Jones is a Democrat in one of the reddest states in the country, and accused criminal Roy Moore came within one point of defeating him in 2017.** **[We can't afford to lose any Democratic seats if we're going to win the Senate back in 2020 -- so we need YOUR help to win in Alabama. subject: In photos: First Lady Melania Trump visits children at Boston Medical Center
body:
Mrs. Trump traveled to Boston yesterday, where she highlighted a treatment program for babies born with Neonatal Abstinence Syndrome. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e0db59b22&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 7, 2019
---
| | |
# **In photos: First Lady Melania Trump visits children at Boston Medical Center**

**First Lady Melania Trump** traveled to Boston yesterday morning, where she highlighted a treatment program for babies born with Neonatal Abstinence Syndrome (NAS). The trip comes as part of her signature Be Best initiative for child well-being.

[Photos: See the First Lady promote Be Best in Boston](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=76cde9608f&e=3ee4985eea)

**“As you may know,** this is an issue I am very focused on,” Mrs. Trump said from the medical center. “I hope today’s visit helps shine a light on programs like yours.”

**During the visit,** the hospital’s staff and leadership gave her a firsthand look at their innovative lineup of programs. First up was one called Project RESPECT, which provides medically assisted treatment to almost 200 women annually. Its mission is to create a more stable environment for mothers and their babies.

**Another important program** at the center is called CALM, which stands for “Cuddling Assists in Lowering Maternal and Infant Stress.” The initiative brings in volunteers from across the community to hold babies with NAS, offering them comfort while also decreasing withdrawal symptoms when a child’s parents aren’t available.

**The final initiative** the First Lady observed is called the Supporting Our Families Through Addiction and Recovery (SOFAR) Clinic. The SOFAR Clinic, launched in 2017, focuses on the wellness of families as a whole during the lengthy addiction recovery process.

**Mrs. Trump** had the chance to meet firsthand with children and families currently enrolled in the SOFAR program**.** “Be Best is dedicated to shining a light on programs similar to the ones I learned about today,” she said. “The programs implemented supply the necessary services and education to patients and families struggling with addiction.”

[Learn more about the First Lady’s Be Best initiative.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6f974d0d1b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
# **Tonight, 9/11 hero posthumously honored by President**

**On September 11, 2001,** Colonel Richard Rescorla saved nearly 2,700 lives at the World Trade Center in New York at the cost of his own.

**During the attack** on the Twin Towers, Rescorla—a commissioned officer in the Vietnam War—ignored a P.A. system announcement that urged people inside the building to shelter in place. Instead, he assisted in evacuating employees, directing them to stairwells and keeping everyone calm amid the growing chaos.

**Then, rather than** **saving himself** , Rick stayed behind to keep helping others. He said he would leave “as soon as I make sure everyone else is out.” He died when the South Tower collapsed at 9:59 a.m. ET.

**Tonight,** **President Trump** is proud to honor this American hero posthumously with the Presidential Citizens Medal.

[Watch live: President Trump presents the Citizens Medal at 6 p.m. ET](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b34844954b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
| **First Lady Melania Trump visits with patients and family members during a tour of the pediatric wing at Boston Medical Center** | November 6, 2019
---
|

| | | | What will they come up with next?

| The Democratic Party has shifted so far left, it is almost unrecognizable.

They are using the Constitution as it was never intended and trying to impeach our President because they simply can not get over losing the White House.

| We cannot let them continue to have their way in Washington. If liberals win the White House, keep the majority in the House and win control over the Senate, the door will be open for them to push their radical agenda of open borders, gun confiscation, and skyrocketing tax-rates for the middle class.

| | **We CAN NOT let that happen!**
